title: Script scans AAAAUGGGHH
wikitext:
[]: Script scans! AAAAUGGGHH!             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Thu Mar 01, 2007 3:32 pm As some of you probably know, thekillingmantra scanned (or captured?) the original Japanese teleplay scripts included with the release of Renewal. They are hosted here . However, I just noticed that the second page of episode 5 is missing. Does anyone have this image or know how to contact Mantra to have him recapture it?

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Thu Mar 01, 2007 4:02 pm Those aren't storyboards. Don't get my hopes up again.

[]:             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Thu Mar 01, 2007 4:15 pm Szmitten wrote: Those aren't storyboards. Don't get my hopes up again.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu Mar 01, 2007 6:41 pm If I'm not mistaken, these are the very scripts that the commentary is based on. Reichu has taken upon herself the painstaking task of translating these as a basis for the format of the commentary pages. Reichu may have the missing page, but you'll have to wait till she returns at the weekend to find out.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 02, 2007 3:16 am ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: If I'm not mistaken, these are the very scripts that the commentary is based on. Reichu has taken upon herself the painstaking task of translating these as a basis for the format of the commentary pages.
